pi_items.source: task.json and export_result.sh explicitly check for /home/ga/Cases/JPEG_Catalog_2024*/autopsy.db
task.json instructions and setup_task.sh checks/uses this path
export_result.sh reads from this path to evaluate the agent's catalog
export_result.sh reads from this path to evaluate the agent's summary
export_result.sh writes to this path and verifier.py extracts it
setup_task.sh writes to this path and verifier.py extracts it

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real DFTT #8 JPEG Search disk image, an authentic forensic test dataset containing an NTFS file system with embedded JPEG files, downloaded from the SourceForge DFTT repository. The evaluation accurately queries Autopsy's backend SQLite database for the target case 'JPEG_Catalog_2024' and verifies that the agent has properly cataloged files into the expected '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog.tsv' TSV output path.
